compiled_state.title: As a developer, the review workflow documentation accurately reflects multi-stack lint and dependency-audit commands
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md to remove hardcoded make lint-ruff / make lint-mypy invocations, and extend DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md to include npm audit and bundle-audit alongside the existing pip-audit entry.

**Why**: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md currently shows Python-specific lint commands as the example invocation. Agents following this workflow on Ruby or JS/TS projects run Python-specific commands that don't exist. DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md omits npm audit and bundle-audit, leaving JS and Ruby security scanning undocumented.

**Scope**:
- IN: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md lines 85-86 (replace make lint-ruff / make lint-mypy with generic placeholder or commands.lint invocation); REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md lines 10-11 (default values — replace Python-specific defaults); DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md: add npm audit entry (npm audit --audit-level=moderate) and bundle-audit entry (bundle-audit check --update) alongside pip-audit (pip-audit --strict)
- OUT: reviewer-base.md, reviewer-delta-light.md, build-review-agents.sh (Story 1); INSTALL.md restructure (Epic E)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md lines 85-86 no longer hardcode make lint-ruff / make lint-mypy; lines 10-11 default values do not reference Python-specific tools
  ← Satisfies: "REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md lines 85-86 updated; lines 10-11 default values updated"
- When this story is complete, DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md contains entries for all three audit tools: pip-audit (pip-audit --strict), npm audit (npm audit --audit-level=moderate), bundle-audit (bundle-audit check --update); all three present with named invocation form
  ← Satisfies: "DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md extended: pip-audit, npm audit, bundle-audit"
- When this story is complete, unit tests pass (or grep confirms the updated content is present and the removed content is absent)

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md references commands.lint — if Epic B has not yet landed, note that commands.lint is a planned key (not yet enforced); do not assume it exists in dso-config.conf at edit time
- [Scope] Do not modify validator.sh or any script — text/prose updates only in this story

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Story complete: all 3 tasks closed, completion-verifier PASS, RED markers cleaned up.
comments.author: Test
